en: the "purple" mussel, i.e. (by implication) the red-blue color itself, and finally a garment dyed with it
interrogative pronoun (of amount) how much (large, long or (plural) many)
a current, brook or freshet (as drinkable), i.e. running water
interrogatively, whatever, i.e. of what possible sort
interrogative adverb, at what time
a drinking-vessel; by extension, the contents thereof, i.e. a cupful (draught); figuratively, a lot or fate
to furnish drink, irrigate
as adverb of place, somewhere, i.e. nearly
as adverb of place; at (by implication, to) what locality
a "foot" (figuratively or literally)
the prætorium or governor's courtroom (sometimes including the whole edifice and camp)
a garden plot, i.e. (by implication, of regular beds) a row (repeated in plural by Hebraism, to indicate an arrangement)
older; as noun, a senior; specially, an Israelite Sanhedrist (also figuratively, member of the celestial council) or Christian "presbyter"
prior, sooner
"fore", i.e. in front of, prior (figuratively, superior) to
to lead forward (magisterially); intransitively, to precede (in place or time (participle, previous))
a forecourt, i.e. vestibule (alley-way)
to walk forward, i.e. advance (literally, or in years)
kjv: + be of a great age, go farther (on), be well stricken

en: something that walks forward (a quadruped), i.e. (specially), a sheep (literally or figuratively)
to go onward, precede (in place or time)
kjv: go before (farther, forward), outgo, pass on

en: a setting forth, i.e. (figuratively) proposal (intention); specially, the show-bread (in the Temple) as exposed before God
forward in spirit, i.e. predisposed; neuter (as noun) alacrity
to take in advance, i.e. (literally) eat before others have an opportunity; (figuratively) to anticipate, surprise
to say beforehand, i.e. predict, forewarn
to care (anxiously) in advance

a preposition of direction; forward to, i.e. toward (with the genitive case, the side of, i.e. pertaining to; with the dative case, by the side of, i.e. near to; usually with the accusative case, the place, time, occasion, or respect, which is the destination of the relation, i.e. whither or for which it is predicated)
kjv: about, according to , against, among, at, because of, before, between, (where-)by, for, X at thy house, in, for intent, nigh unto, of, which pertain to, that, to (the end that), X together, to (you) -ward, unto, with(-in)

en: a fore-sabbath, i.e. the Sabbath-eve
to ask repeatedly (importune), i.e. solicit
to admit (to intercourse, hospitality, credence, or (figuratively) endurance); by implication, to await (with confidence or patience)
to approach, i.e. (literally) come near, visit, or (figuratively) worship, assent to
kjv: (as soon as he) come (unto), come thereunto, consent, draw near, go (near, to, unto)

en: prayer (worship); by implication, an oratory (chapel)
to pray to God, i.e. supplicate, worship
for the occasion only, i.e. temporary
kjv: dur-(eth) for awhile, endure for a time, for a season, temporal

en: to call toward oneself, i.e. summon, invite
to be earnest towards, i.e. (to a thing) to persevere, be constantly diligent, or (in a place) to attend assiduously all the exercises, or (to a person) to adhere closely to (as a servitor)
kjv: attend (give self) continually (upon), continue (in, instant in, with), wait on (continually)

en: something for the head, i.e. a cushion
to roll towards, i.e. block against
to fawn or crouch to, i.e. (literally or figuratively) prostrate oneself in homage (do reverence to, adore)
to take to oneself, i.e. use (food), lead (aside), admit (to friendship or hospitality)
to stay further, i.e. remain in a place, with a person; figuratively, to adhere to, persevere in
kjv: abide still, be with, cleave unto, continue in (with)

en: to moor to, i.e. (by implication) land at
to fall towards, i.e. (gently) prostrate oneself (in supplication or homage), or (violently) to rush upon (in storm)
to journey towards, i.e. approach (not the same as G4313 (προπορεύομαι))
to arrange towards, i.e. (figuratively) enjoin
to place additionally, i.e. lay beside, annex, repeat
kjv: add, again, give more, increase, lay unto, proceed further, speak to any more

en: to run towards, i.e. hasten to meet or join
to bear towards, i.e. lead to, tender (especially to God), treat
kjv: bring (to, unto), deal with, do, offer (unto, up), present unto, put to

en: the front (as being towards view), i.e. the countenance, aspect, appearance, surface; by implication, presence, person
kjv: (outward) appearance, X before, countenance, face, fashion, (men's) person, presence

en: an outward showing, i.e. pretext
to foretell events, divine, speak under inspiration, exercise the prophetic office
a foreteller ("prophet"); by analogy, an inspired speaker; by extension, a poet
the stern of a ship
at dawn; by implication, the day-break watch
a sitting first (in the front row), i.e. preeminence in council
a reclining first (in the place of honor) at the dinner-bed, i.e. preeminence at meals
firstly (in time, place, order, or importance)
kjv: before, at the beginning, chiefly (at, at the) first (of all)

en: foremost (in time, place, order or importance)
kjv: before, beginning, best, chief(-est), first (of all), former

en: to spit
a ruin, i.e. (specially), lifeless body (corpse, carrion)

akin to G4422 (πτοέω) and the alternate of G4098 (πίπτω)); a beggar (as cringing), i.e. pauper (strictly denoting absolute or public mendicancy, although also used in a qualified or relative sense; whereas G3993 (πένης) properly means only straitened circumstances in private), literally (often as noun) or figuratively (distressed)
clasped (thick), i.e. (figuratively) frequent; neuter plural (as adverb) frequently
"fire" (literally or figuratively, specially, lightning)
a tower or castle
to be on fire, i.e. (specially), to have a fever
inflamed, i.e. (by implication) feverish (as noun, fever)
to barter (as a pedlar), i.e. to sell
a "foal" or "filly", i.e. (specially), a young ass
to petrify, i.e. (figuratively) to indurate (render stupid or callous)
stupidity or callousness
an interrogative particle of manner; in what way? (sometimes the question is indirect, how?); also as exclamation, how much!
my master, i.e Rabbi, as an official title of honor
corresponding to G4461 (ῥαββί)
a stick or wand (as a cudgel, a cane or a baton of royalty)
a "rag," i.e. piece of cloth
a slap
kjv: (+ strike with the) palm of the hand, smite with the hand

en: perhaps rather akin to the base of G4474 (ῥαπίζω) through the idea of puncturing); a needle

G2608 (κατάγνυμι) being its intensive (with the preposition in composition), and G2352 (θραύω) a shattering to minute fragments; but not a reduction to the constituent particles, like G3089 (λύω)) or disrupt, lacerate; by implication, to convulse (with spasms); figuratively, to give vent to joyful emotions
an utterance (individually, collectively or specially),; by implication, a matter or topic (especially of narration, command or dispute); with a negative naught whatever
a "root" (literally or figuratively)
red; Rufus, a Christian
a flux (of blood)
thou hast left me; sabachthani (i.e. shebakthani), a cry of distress

the Sabbath (i.e. Shabbath), or day of weekly repose from secular avocations (also the observance or institution itself); by extension, a se'nnight, i.e. the interval between two Sabbaths; likewise the plural in all the above applications
a Sadducæan (i.e. Tsadokian), or follower of a certain heretical Israelite
